---
title: "madslypig.github.io"
image: "willow.png.jpg",
about:
  template: broadside
  image-shape: square
  image-width: 20cm
---

My name is Maddie Cunningham and I am a Research Associate with the San Diego Zoo Wildlife Alliance. I currently work with an endangered species and aim to focus on how anthropogenic effects water quality and the surrounding ecosystem.

-   Education:

-   Experience:
